<tool_call>{"name": "create_file", "arguments": {"path": "gson/src/test/java/com/google/gson/BasicSerializationTest.java", "content": "package com.google.gson;

import static com.google.common.truth.Truth.assertThat;

import org.junit.Test;

public class BasicSerializationTest {

  private static class Person {
    String name;
    int age;

    Person() {}

    Person(String name, int age) {
      this.name = name;
      this.age = age;
    }
  }

  @Test
  public void testSerializePojo() {
    Gson gson = new Gson();
    String json = gson.toJson(new Person("Alice", 30));
    assertThat(json).contains("Alice");
    assertThat(json).contains("30");
  }

  @Test
  public void testDeserializePojo() {
    Gson gson = new Gson();
    Person p = gson.fromJson("{\"name\":\"Bob\",\"age\":25}", Person.class);
    assertThat(p.name).isEqualTo("Bob");
    assertThat(p.age).isEqualTo(25);
  }

  @Test
  public void testNullHandling() {
    Gson gson = new Gson();
    String json = gson.toJson(null);
    assertThat(json).isEqualTo("null");
  }
}
"}}</tool_call>
